verse_text: by stretching out Your hand to heal, and that signs and wonders may be done through the name of Your holy Servant Jesus.'

links.context: Christians are repeatedly challenged in the NT to be bold in confessing Christ before others (see [[ACT.4:29]]-31; [[ROM.1:16]]). 2:4-6 Paul has been accused of seeking his own glory, but he knows God does not share His glory with any other (Is 48:11). As His servants, we must step outside the circle of world-pleasers and into the arena of pleasing God, whatever the cost. 2:7, 8 Spreading the gospel means putting our lives on the line for those we seek to reach, as a mother sacrifices herself for her children. Thus, the holy martyrs gave their lives with great joy for Christ and His Church.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: Christ's primary mission was to preach the kingdom. Miracles and healings testify both to the truth of the message and the identity of the Teacher (see 5:24). This same pattern holds true in the Church ([[ACT.4:29]], [[ACT.4:30]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
